subject: Parasect — crab-like creature dominated by a large spotted red-and-white mushroom growing from its back, standing in a grassy outdoor setting.
description: A crab-like creature stands in a grassy area with a large red-capped mushroom with white spots covering most of its back. The creature's body is orange-red with multiple legs. The mushroom cap is wide and dominates the silhouette. Behind the creature are green grasses and a suggestion of a tree trunk. The palette is warm and saturated. The composition places the creature low and wide in the frame.
foreground: crab-like creature with large spotted mushroom growing from its back
emotion: blank, zombie-like (flavor text: the bug is mostly dead, mushroom is the main body)
